title: Install wiring: extend skills-and-hooks.ts + init.ts + hooks.ts to install fabric-review skill
description: Wire the fabric-review skill template (TASK-003) into the existing install pipeline alongside fabric-archive. Reuses existing helpers (copyTextIdempotent, addPointer pattern) and follows the same dual-destination pattern (.claude/skills/ AND .codex/skills/). No hook script change is required (TASK-004 extended archive-hint.cjs in place — same .claude/hooks/ + .codex/hooks/ install). Add fabric-review pointer line to CLAUDE.md/AGENTS.md/.cursor/rules.

files.change: Add SKILL_REVIEW_TEMPLATE_REL='skills/fabric-review/SKILL.md', SKILL_REVIEW_DEST_REL=join('skills','fabric-review','SKILL.md'). Export new function `installFabricReviewSkill(projectRoot, options)` mirroring installFabricArchiveSkill: read SKILL_REVIEW_TEMPLATE_REL, write to `.claude/skills/fabric-review/SKILL.md` AND `.codex/skills/fabric-review/SKILL.md`, return InstallStepResult[]. Add REVIEW_POINTER_LINE='> Use the fabric-review Skill to review pending knowledge entries (see .claude/skills/fabric-review/SKILL.md).'. Export `addReviewSkillPointer(projectRoot, options)` mirroring addArchiveSkillPointer with REVIEW_POINTER_LINE.

files.target: executeInitStagePlan bootstrap branch (currently calls installFabricArchiveSkill / installArchiveHintHook / mergeClaudeCodeHookConfig / mergeCodexHookConfig / addArchiveSkillPointer)
files.change: Add `installFabricReviewSkill` and `addReviewSkillPointer` imports next to existing fabric-archive imports. In bootstrap stage executor (or wherever fabric-archive installers are called), add `await installFabricReviewSkill(plan.target, {force})` after `installFabricArchiveSkill` and `await addReviewSkillPointer(plan.target, {force})` after `addArchiveSkillPointer`. Aggregate results into the existing InstallStepResult[] return.

If installHooks (the post-rc.2 implementation) already routes through skills-and-hooks installers, add installFabricReviewSkill + addReviewSkillPointer calls alongside the archive variants. If hooks.ts is a thin wrapper that only calls installArchiveHintHook + mergeClaudeCodeHookConfig + mergeCodexHookConfig (no skill installs from this entry point), document that re-running `fab init` is the canonical path for skill (re)install.

implementation: Read packages/cli/src/install/skills-and-hooks.ts:1-100 to confirm export shapes and helper reuse pattern (already done in planning context)

In skills-and-hooks.ts: declare 2 new const literals (SKILL_REVIEW_TEMPLATE_REL, SKILL_REVIEW_DEST_REL); add REVIEW_POINTER_LINE; extend POINTER_TARGETS NOT touched (same 3 targets receive both pointer lines)

Implement installFabricReviewSkill: clone installFabricArchiveSkill body, swap SKILL_TEMPLATE_REL → SKILL_REVIEW_TEMPLATE_REL, swap SKILL_DEST_REL → SKILL_REVIEW_DEST_REL. Return InstallStepResult[] with step='skill-review'

Implement addReviewSkillPointer: clone addArchiveSkillPointer body, swap POINTER_LINE → REVIEW_POINTER_LINE, step name 'pointer-review'. Skips if review pointer already present (independent dedup from archive pointer)

Read packages/cli/src/commands/init.ts; locate the call site of installFabricArchiveSkill (likely in executeInitStagePlan bootstrap branch); add installFabricReviewSkill call directly after, with same options/error handling
Locate addArchiveSkillPointer call site; add addReviewSkillPointer call directly after

Read packages/cli/src/commands/hooks.ts; if it imports from skills-and-hooks.ts, add the 2 new imports + 2 new calls; if it's just hook-script-only, leave hooks.ts untouched (init.ts is sole canonical install path for skills)
Update existing init-atomic.test.ts assertions if they enumerate exact written-files (add fabric-review SKILL.md to expected set)
Run `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli test`; verify integration tests pass; commit as 'feat(cli): wire fabric-review skill installer into init pipeline (rc.3 TASK-006)'

reference.pattern: Sibling installer pattern (clone fabric-archive helpers and swap template paths)
reference.examples: All helpers already exist for fabric-archive; clone+swap template constants; reuse copyTextIdempotent, mkdir, atomicWriteText, deepMerge

criteria: After fab init, .claude/skills/fabric-review/SKILL.md AND .codex/skills/fabric-review/SKILL.md both exist with content matching template (verified by integration test)
Re-running fab init produces zero diff for fabric-review files (sha256 byte-identical, mirroring init-guard.test.ts pattern)
CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md / .cursor/rules contain BOTH archive pointer line AND review pointer line after init (when those files exist)
Installing with no-op skip path: when SKILL.md already up-to-date, returns InstallStepResult{status:'skipped', message:'up-to-date'}
All integration tests pass; install-fabric-review.test.ts achieves >=90% coverage on new exports

rationale.chosen_approach: Sibling installer with clone-and-swap; pointer line independent dedup; no hook re-install change required (TASK-004 modified hook in place)
alternatives_considered: Generalize installFabricSkill(name, templatePath, destPath) — rejected: only 2 skills today, premature abstraction; rc.4 fabric-import will revisit
Single combined POINTER_LINE for both skills — rejected: independent dedup means re-running can re-add review pointer if user manually deletes it without disturbing archive pointer
decision_factors: Existing helpers compose; minimal new code
rationale.tradeoffs: Code duplication of the 5-line installer body across 2 skills — accepted for clarity; rc.4 may refactor

manual_checks: Run `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli build && node dist/index.js init` against a tmp project; verify both SKILL.md files appear in .claude/skills/ and .codex/skills/
Re-run init; verify zero file diff (idempotent)
success_metrics: skills-and-hooks.ts coverage delta: new exports >=90% lines

risks.description: init.ts call site for fabric-archive may not exist in current main (only base scaffolding committed) — locating fabric-archive install call site may require searching across init.ts
risks.mitigation: grep packages/cli/src/commands/init.ts for installFabricArchiveSkill; if absent, the planning agent's code anchor is stale — TASK-001 of rc.2 must have wired it; recent commit f0a33a8 'feat(cli): wire fabric-archive skill + hook install' confirms presence
risks.fallback: If somehow not present, add both archive and review installer calls in the same edit
